name: Greek Salad

ingredients.item: medium tomatoes, cored and cut into wedges
cucumbers, peeled and sliced 1/2 inch thick

In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, vinegar, and oregano. Season with salt and pepper. In a large bowl, combine the cucumbers, cheese, romaine, tomatoes, and olives. Toss the salad with the dressing and serve at once.

method: In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, vinegar, and oregano. Season with salt and pepper. In a large bowl, combine the cucumbers, cheese, romaine, tomatoes, and olives. Toss the salad with the dressing and serve at once.
